ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "mixture" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the mixture used in the experiment */,
  "other_value" REAL /* Other numerical value associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or annotations for the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "protocol_id" TEXT /* ID of the experimental protocol used */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethical_approval" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the experiment has ethical approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_mixture FOREIGN KEY ("mixture") REFERENCES mixture_details ("mixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell composition record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the cell type in the experiment */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure cell proportions */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or annotations related to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_compositions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_compositions_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "cell_lineage" TEXT /* Lineage of the cell type */,
  "cell_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the cell type */,
  "literature_reference" TEXT /* Reference to relevant literature or studies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the experiment */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation coefficient of the experiment */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean square error (RMSE) of the experiment */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the statistical metrics */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used in the experiment */,
  "statistical_method" TEXT /* Method used for statistical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mixture_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mixture composition record */,
  "mixture_id" TEXT /* ID of the mixture */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component in the mixture */,
  "component_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the component in the mixture */,
  "component_source" TEXT /* Source of the mixture component */,
  "component_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the mixture component */,
  "component_purity" REAL /* Purity of the mixture component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mixture_compositions_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES mixture_details ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mixture_details" (
  "mixture_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mixture */,
  "mixture_name" TEXT /* Name of the mixture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mixture */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mixture was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the mixture */,
  "mixture_type" TEXT /* Type of the mixture (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "mixture_concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the mixture */,
  "mixture_stability" TEXT /* Stability of the mixture over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_annotions" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., observation, hypothesis, conclusion) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending review, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_annotions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_annotions_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "version_approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when access will expire */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
